title: EventDataPayload
description: The payload structure for pre-normalized event data ingestion directly into the XSIAM data lake. Contains all required routing metadata plus the normalized event content for direct dataset indexing.

dataset.description: The target XSIAM dataset name for direct indexing. Must match an existing dataset schema in the XSIAM data lake.

vendor.description: The vendor that produced the source event data.

product.description: The product that generated the source event.

log_type.description: The log type or event category identifier for schema selection during indexing.

raw_log.description: The original raw event content from the source system, preserved alongside normalized fields for audit and reprocessing purposes.

timestamp.description: The ISO 8601 date-time string indicating when the original event occurred at the source system.

tenant_id.description: The XSIAM tenant identifier for multi-tenant data routing.

event_id.description: A unique identifier for this event record used for deduplication and correlation reference.
